overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity depicting an 18th-century French protagonist navigating a historic Parisian palace courtyard and interior. The character moves through crowds of NPCs in period attire, transitions from an outdoor cobblestone plaza into an ornate palace, ascends a grand staircase, and explores lavishly decorated upper floor rooms with classical architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic palace courtyard with cobblestone ground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the crowded courtyard toward the palace archway entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in elaborate blue dress and white bonnet walking past the character
man in grey coat and tricorn hat gesturing while conversing

entered.detail: classical stone building with tall windows and columns surrounding the courtyard
circular stone fountain basin with water
grey cobblestone ground surface covering the courtyard
large arched entrance with columns leading into the palace interior
blue and white striped canopy tent near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit historic courtyard surrounded by classical stone palace architecture. The cobblestone ground is populated with NPCs in 18th-century French attire walking and conversing. The character approaches a large arched entrance ahead, passing a fountain on the right and vendor stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace entrance foyer with grand staircase

events.description: character walks through the classical archway from outdoor courtyard into the palace interior

agents.ego_description: entering the palace foyer and walking across the checkered floor toward the grand staircase

notable_agents.action: man in green coat and tricorn hat standing with arms crossed near the wardrobe

entered.detail: sweeping staircase with white marble steps and ornate black railing
long red carpet with gold trim running through the center of the foyer
black and white diamond-patterned marble floor
tall dark wooden cabinet with carved details
large framed classical painting on the wall above the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bright courtyard into the palace foyer, where natural light mixes with interior lighting. The space features a checkered marble floor, a grand staircase to the left, and NPCs standing in conversation. The character walks across the red carpet runner toward the staircase area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with red carpeted steps

events.description: character begins ascending the grand staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the red-carpeted grand staircase, following the curve to the upper level

entered.detail: staircase steps covered in red carpet with gold edges
black wrought iron railing with gold decorative elements
white marble wall with grey veining
portrait paintings in gold frames hanging on the stairwell wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase, transitioning from the open foyer to the enclosed stairwell. The camera follows from behind as the character climbs the red-carpeted steps alongside ornate iron railings and marble walls. The space is quieter with fewer NPCs present.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor palace rooms with red carpets and classical furnishings

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper floor hallway

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper floor rooms, passing by NPCs seated in conversation and examining the ornate interior

notable_agents.action: two men in blue coats seated on a sofa engaged in conversation

entered.detail: large ornate chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candles
floor-to-ceiling windows with decorative lattice patterns allowing sunlight to stream in
dark mahogany wood paneling covering the walls
white marble bust on a wooden pedestal
folding screen with red and gold patterned fabric panels

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the upper floor into a lavishly decorated space with red carpets, dark wood paneling, and tall windows casting beams of sunlight across the room. Crystal chandeliers hang from the ceiling, and NPCs sit on antique furniture conversing. The character explores the room, passing marble busts and ornate room dividers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, sunlit outdoor courtyard into the opulent, secluded interiors of a French palace. It begins by navigating a cobblestone plaza filled with NPCs in period attire, passing vendor stalls and a fountain while moving toward a large arched entrance. As the character crosses the threshold, the bright daylight blends with interior lighting over a checkered marble floor and a red carpet runner leading toward a grand staircase. The camera then follows the ascent up the red-carpeted steps, transitioning from the open foyer into a quieter, enclosed stairwell framed by ornate iron railings and marble walls. Finally, the scene opens into a lavish upper floor where beams of sunlight pierce through tall windows, illuminating crystal chandeliers, dark wood paneling, and antique furniture.
